collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (23 total Queries, 23 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT SUM(upgrade_amount) as total, SUM(withdrawal_limit) as total_limit FROM upgrades WHERE member_id='718338'
SELECT date, up_date as invest, up_amount, income FROM roi WHERE member_id='718338' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT income_from, level, income, date FROM level_income WHERE member_id='718338'
SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM txn_details WHERE member_id='718338' AND type='withdrawal' AND (transfer_from is NULL or transfer_from='income')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, COUNT(*) as total FROM pool1 WHERE upline_id!='' GROUP BY upline_id) aa WHERE total<2
SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, COUNT(*) as total FROM pool1 WHERE upline_id!='' GROUP BY upline_id) aa WHERE total<=2 ORDER BY id DESC

WITH RECURSIVE downline AS ( SELECT user_id, upline_id, member_id, 0 AS level FROM pool1 WHERE user_id = '3068c535bd66739' UNION ALL SELECT p.user_id, p.upline_id, p.member_id, d.level + 1 FROM pool1 p INNER JOIN downline d ON p.user_id = d.upline_id WHERE d.level < 5 ) UPDATE pool1 t JOIN downline d ON t.user_id = d.user_id SET t.income = t.income + 1, t.upgrade_balance = t.upgrade_balance + 1 WHERE d.level>0
SELECT user_id, member_id, up_id FROM pool1 WHERE upgrade_balance >= 62 AND user_id NOT IN(SELECT user_id FROM pool2)
